nodes.name: Spelaeornis
nodes.summary: Spelaeornis（Spelaeornis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联8种鸟类，如棕喉鹩鹛、锈喉鹩鹛、斑翅鹩鹛等8种鸟类。

nodes.name: Chin Hills wren-babbler
nodes.summary: The Chin Hills wren-babbler (Spelaeornis oatesi) is a bird species in the family Timaliidae. It was until recently considered a subspecies of the long-tailed wren-babbler; the IUCN for example started recognizing it as distinct species in 2008. It is found in India and Myanmar. Its natural habitat are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It is therefore classified as a Species of Least Concern by the IUCN. Footnotes References BirdLife International (BLI) (2008): 2008 IUCN Redlist status changes. Retrieved 2008-MAY-23.
